finding: SPEC-CONFORMANCE GAP: AgentCard.url ("http://localhost:18441") does not include the JSON-RPC dispatch base path ("/a2a"); a spec-faithful client that POSTs to card.URL literally (per a2a-go v0.3.15 a2aclient.NewFromCard, which builds its sole AgentInterface from {Transport: card.PreferredTransport, URL: card.URL}) receives HTTP 404 from the real live server. See wire_01_message_send.txt.
